overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit downtown district. The player crosses a wet intersection and walks along a sidewalk beneath towering skyscrapers with bright holographic advertisements, eventually passing under an elevated highway overpass. The scene features characteristic cyberpunk aesthetics with reflective wet pavement, red and cyan neon lighting, and futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with yellow crosswalk markings

events.description: crossing from asphalt road onto concrete sidewalk
futuristic vehicles pass by on the right while crossing the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk and stepping onto the sidewalk, moving away from the intersection

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving past the crosswalk with headlights on

entered.detail: broad yellow-striped pedestrian crossing on wet asphalt
tall building with prominent red neon SOFTSYS signage
modern glass skyscraper with illuminated windows
tall pole with bright overhead lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment begins crossing a wet yellow crosswalk at night, with vehicles passing on the right. The camera moves onto a concrete sidewalk, passing the SOFTSYS building with its distinctive red neon signage visible in the distance on the left, while modern glass towers rise on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown sidewalk lined with corporate towers and neon advertisements

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the towering skyscrapers and neon signs above
camera returns to forward-facing walking position

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk while observing the towering architecture and neon advertisements overhead

entered.detail: highway overpass structure with orange lighting visible in the distance
vertical red neon signage on the SOFTSYS building facade

segments.scene_description: Walking along the open sidewalk with the SOFTSYS building now prominent on the left. The camera briefly looks up at the towering glass skyscrapers and neon signs against the night sky. The elevated highway overpass becomes visible in the distance ahead, while vehicles continue to pass on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching elevated highway underpass with concrete infrastructure

events.description: entering the shadow of the elevated overpass structure, lighting becomes darker
large concrete support pillar passes by on the left, temporarily blocking view of the street

agents.ego_description: walking toward and entering the covered area beneath the elevated highway, passing a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking in the opposite direction on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive concrete columns supporting the elevated highway structure
smooth concrete barrier wall running along the left side of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Approaching the elevated highway overpass, the environment transitions to a semi-covered space with concrete support pillars. The SOFTSYS building is now very close on the left. A pedestrian passes by in the opposite direction as the camera enters the darker, sheltered area beneath the overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway with artificial lighting

events.description: white van drives past on the right side of the underpass road

agents.ego_description: continuing through the dimly lit underpass with concrete walls and overhead fluorescent lighting, approaching pedestrians ahead

notable_agents.action: woman standing near the curb looking at oncoming traffic

entered.detail: long fluorescent light bars mounted on the underside of the overpass
yellow grid markings on the asphalt road under the overpass

segments.scene_description: Walking fully beneath the elevated highway overpass in an enclosed concrete corridor illuminated by artificial lighting. The SOFTSYS building is no longer visible. Vehicles pass on the right under the cover of the overpass, and pedestrians are visible ahead near the road. The environment feels more enclosed and tunnel-like.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from an open, neon-lit city intersection into the enclosed concrete shadows of an elevated highway overpass. It begins by crossing a wet yellow crosswalk with vehicles passing on the right, moving onto a concrete sidewalk as the red neon signage of the SOFTSYS building appears in the distance. As the camera advances, the view briefly tilts upward toward towering glass skyscrapers and glowing signs before the elevated highway structure becomes prominent ahead. The scene then shifts into a semi-covered space characterized by massive concrete support pillars and passing pedestrians, bringing the SOFTSYS building into close proximity on the left. Finally, the environment transitions into a dark, tunnel-like corridor fully beneath the overpass, where the open skyline vanishes and the space is defined by artificial lighting and the rhythmic flow of traffic alongside the sheltered walkway.
